---
description: "Instructions for the README solution."
applyTo: "/README.md"
references:
  - 'docs/bc.md'
---

# README Solution Instructions
- Use the provided template / examples.
- Look at docs/bc.md for solutions description.
- Replace all placeholders with project-specific content.
- Include sections such as project description, installation instructions, usage examples, and any other relevant information
- Include badges for build status, code coverage, and other relevant metrics if applicable.

## Template (Minimal):
```markdown
[Insert badges here, e.g., build status, code coverage]

# [Insert Project Name]
[Insert a brief description of the project, its purpose, and its main features.]

## Table of Contents

## Installation
[Insert instructions for installing the project, including any dependencies and setup steps.]

<!-- Links -->
[Insert Link for badges, e.g., build status, code coverage]
[Insert any relevant links, such as documentation, issue tracker, or contribution guidelines.]
```

## Example:
```markdown
[![NuGet Downloads][nuget-shield]][nuget-url]
[![Contributors][contributors-shield]][contributors-url]
[![License][license-shield]][license-url]
[![Forks][forks-shield]][forks-url]
[![Stars][stars-shield]][stars-url]
[![Repo Size][repo-size-shield]][repo-size-url]
[![.NET 10][dotnet-shield]][dotnet-url]
[![Issues][issues-shield]][issues-url]

# ![Logo][logo] Example Project

## Table of Contents

<a name="solution-goals"></a>

### 📦 Restore dependencies

### 🧪 Run automated tests

<a name="usage"></a>

<a name="documentation"></a>

<!-- MARKDOWN LINKS & IMAGES -->
[contributors-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/contributors/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge
[contributors-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/graphs/contributors
[forks-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/forks/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge
[forks-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/network/members
[stars-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/stars/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge
[stars-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/stargazers
[issues-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/issues/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge
[issues-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/issues
[license-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/license/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge
[license-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/blob/master/LICENSE
[linkedin-shield]: https://img.shields.io/badge/-LinkedIn-black.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin&colorB=555
[linkedin-url]: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jens-tirsvad-nielsen-13b795b9/
[githubIssue-url]: https://github.com/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/issues/
[repos-size-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]?style=for-the-badge

<!-- Build Status -->
[build-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/workflow/status/[InsertOwner]/[InsertRepo]/[InsertWorkflowName]?style=for-the-badge

<!-- Logo -->
[logo]: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TirsvadCLI/Dotnet.Lib.MenuPaginator/master/image/logo/32x32/logo.png

```

if you have a NuGet package, you can include the following badge and link:
```markdown
<!-- Nuget -->
[nuget-shield]: https://img.shields.io/nuget/dt/[InsertPackageName]?style=for-the-badge
[nuget-url]: https://www.nuget.org/packages/[InsertPackageName]/
```



Bagdes can be added to the top of the README file, and links can be included in the relevant sections of the README. Make sure to replace all placeholders with project-specific content.
